connectors.connector: SELECT path('$.database.username')->username:string, path('$.app.version')->name:string, path('$.database.url')->email:string, path('$.database.username')->age:string, path('$.database.password')->department:object path('$.server.port')->salary:object path('$.logging.level')->hireDate:object FROM PROPERTIES( filepath: 'D:\my\jquick-connector\src\test\resources\file\config.properties', searchPath: '$' )
